title: Kerner (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kerner''' could refer to the following:

*[[Kerner (pirate)|Kerner]], a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]
*[[Kerner (company)|Kerner]], an optics company
*[[Kerner Plaza/Legends|Kerner Plaza]], [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]
*[[Outer Kerner Way]], Mos Eisley

{{Disambig}}
